front.title: Stateful NAT64: Network Address and Protocol Translation from IPv6 Clients to IPv4 Servers

abstract.t:
This document describes stateful NAT64 translation, which allows IPv6-only clients to contact IPv4-only servers using unicast UDP, TCP, or ICMP. One or more public IPv4 addresses assigned to a NAT64 translator are shared among several IPv6-only clients. When stateful NAT64 is used in conjunction with DNS64, no changes are required in either the IPv6 client or the IPv4 server.
This document obsoletes RFC6146.
